target: July 22nd
1. Call Sou
(First, I should contact Sou.)
(In order for him to grasp what has happened so far, I need him to see Ushio's memories...!)
Hey, Shinpei! What's up? You said you'd call later, you're pretty early.
Ah, sorry.
Nah, it's fine. I wanted to talk early too.
Hey, Shinpei. Actually... about Ushio...
The Yoshikawa lines, right.
...Wha!? How do you know!?
Including that... there's something I want to ask of you. I want to borrow your strength.
Come to the Hitogashima Elementary and Junior High School gym now. I'll tell you the details there.
Hah...!? I don't get what you mean at all. Telling me to come to the school so suddenly...
Please, Sou! It's important!
...Alright, I'll go.
I-Is that okay?
Knowing you, there's gotta be a reason. It's something you can't say over the phone, right? I'll hear the reason at the school.
Thank you...
Also, is Tokiko-chan nearby? Put her on the phone for a sec.
To Tokiko?
Yeah, I want Tokiko-chan to come to the school too.
I see, wait a sec.
He~y, Tokiko! Shinpei wants to talk to you!
(At this point in time, Tokiko-chan is cooperating with Haine.)
(But if I show her the memories from Hiruko Cave, and she realizes she'll be betrayed by Haine and the others, she should become our ally.)
(Even if she doesn't know Haine's true goal, we might be able to hear about the enemy's internal affairs.)
...Shin-chan.
Hm?

Give me the phone.
I'll talk to Tokiko.
No, can't do that.
Why not?
The current Tokiko-chan doesn't know anything yet. Until we share our memories, I want to keep the information we give her to a minimum.
You might have things you want to say, but hold it in for now.
Sorry, Tokiko's not here.
That's weird. I thought she was in her room after getting out of the bath earlier.
If that's the case, can you pass the message to Tokiko-chan for me?

Yeah, sure.
I'll tell her later.
If you can't tell her directly, leave Tokiko-chan a message telling her to come to the school.

Leave it to me.
See you later!
...Alright! We got Sou and Tokiko-chan! Who's next?
Let's call Totsumura-san too. He helped us at Hiruko Cave, and he is a cop, after all.
If we're calling him, I'll have to ask him to let me scan his gun later.
I wonder where Totsumura-san is right now? I hope he's at the police station...
Yes, this is the hero of justice!
Thank goodness! Totsumura-san is there.
That voice, is that Shinpei-kun? What's wrong?
Actually... something terrible is going to happen at the school after this!
At the school? What do you mean, something terrible!?
Please! I'll be waiting in the school gym, so could you come!?
Hey, hey, be more specific! I don't understand what's going on at all!
The police can't just act on a phone call that sounds like a prank, you know?
(Well, I figured he'd say that...)
(But I can't just back down here either.)
Please, somehow! I absolutely need your help, Totsumura-san!
That's why I'm telling you to explain properly――
There's one specific thing I can tell you!
What?
A woman with G-cups will be there too!
Gymnasium, understood!!
Alright...! With this, it looks like everyone will be here.
Totsumura-san is the same as always~. Right, Mio?
Mio, pull yourself together. What happened to your usual energy?
(I see... she still can't accept the story about the pseudo-loop.)
(Ushio's existence, the things Tokiko-chan was hiding...)
(Not to mention Mio herself has lost her life several times... It's probably unreasonable to tell her to accept it right away.)
Ushio, give Mio a little time――
Listen closely, Mio.
Tokiko-chan will be fine. If I show her my memories, she'll definitely wake up.
But…
I don't care about any of that! Whatever it is, we just have to redo it all from now on!
Got it?
Y-Yeah...
Hey... big sister?
Hm~? What is it?
Big... sister...! Big sisterrr!!
Uwaaaaahhhh!!
Eh!? You're suddenly crying so much!!
Big sister is...! S-S-She's hereeeeee!!
Uugh, *hic*...! I'm sorry! For calling you a monster...!
Big sister is, *hic*, big sister...
You're my real big sister!!
...Jeez, you're crying too much.
*Sniff*... *hic*, *hic*, *hic*... *Sniff*... I'll fight too!
Eh, fight... I'm only bringing you along strictly for your safety――
I don't want to just be protected all the time!!
Mio…
Shinpei, it's okay, right?
(Mio has never fought a Shadow before, and the weapons she can use are limited...)
(...Even if I say that, she probably won't listen.)
Well then, should we get ready? We have to leave soon.
Yeah!
Alright! Let's all do... this...?
Aaaaah!!!
W-What!?
W-What, what is it!? Was there something!?
Curry!! I can't eat it today!?
What, it's just curry... Don't scare me like that.
We don't have time to simmer it, so I'll make curry sandwiches instead.
<color=#GF_TIPS_085>Curry sandwich</color>…
I'm down for that!!!!
I should make some for everyone gathering, and for Alain too.
Oh, right! Dad will be worried, so I should leave a note.

Curry!
Curry, curry!
There it is...! Big sister's 'Curry Rhythm'!

Curry, curry!
Curry~!!!
Sando♪ Sando♪
You sisters really are...
(It doesn't feel like we're about to put our lives on the line and fight at all.)
(But maybe because it's a time like this...)
(It's important to eat something good and build up our strength.)
(Alright! I'm gonna put my all into making some delicious curry sandwiches!)
